docs.text:

  3. প্রশ্নটি যদি নির্দিষ্ট Jodoo form field-এর ওপর নির্ভর করে, তাহলে সংশ্লিষ্ট form manual-ও দেখুন।
  4. যদি এখনও প্রশ্নটি না থাকে, প্রশ্ন, screenshot এবং real operation scenario Alen-কে পাঠান, পরে update করা হবে।

docs.title: শুরু করার আগে
docs.text:
Production Department যে Elastic Order Request record দেখতে পায়, সেগুলো আগে থেকেই approved order।

দৈনন্দিন কাজে Production Department-এর Approval Result = Approve filter করার দরকার নেই।

Production Department মূলত এগুলো করবে:

  • Order information দেখা
  • Production arrangement দরকার কি না নিশ্চিত করা
  • Production Arrangement Status update করা

docs.title: প্রশ্ন ১: Production Department-এর জন্য Elastic Order Request-এ কোন Display Fields দেখানো ভালো?
সহজ উত্তর
docs.text:
List fields production arrangement-এর order অনুযায়ী দেখানো ভালো:

Status → Type → Delivery Date → Sales → Customer → Order No.

এতে production staff দ্রুত বুঝতে পারে:

  • এই order handle করতে হবে কি?
  • এটি Sample না Bulk?
  • কবে delivery দিতে হবে?
  • কোন sales person responsible?
  • কোন customer?
  • কোন order?

docs.title: Recommended Display Fields order
docs.text:
সবচেয়ে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ প্রথম ৬টি field:

  1. Production Arrangement Status
  2. Job Type
  3. Expected Delivery Date
  4. Responsible Sales
  5. Customer Code
  6. Company Name

Field meaning:

  • Production Arrangement Status: order pending, scheduled, completed না cancelled তা দেখা।
  • Job Type: এটি Sample না Bulk তা দেখা।
  • Expected Delivery Date: delivery priority বোঝা।
  • Responsible Sales: এই order নিয়ে কোন sales person-এর সাথে কথা বলতে হবে তা জানা।
  • Customer Code: customer দ্রুত খুঁজে বের করা।
  • Company Name: customer name নিশ্চিত করা।

এর পরে এগুলো দেখানো যেতে পারে:

  1. Elastic Order No.
  2. Customer PO No.
  3. Purchase Order Date
  4. Country
  5. Sample Status
  6. Bulk Production Status
  7. Workflow Status

এই fields order source, customer PO, order date এবং পরবর্তী status confirm করতে সাহায্য করে।

docs.title: Production Arrangement Status কীভাবে ব্যবহার করবেন?
docs.text:
Production Department মূলত এই field update করে:

Production Arrangement Status

Status meaning:

  • Pending: এখনও arrange করা হয়নি। Production Department-এর handle করতে হবে।
  • Scheduled: sample বা bulk production arrange করা হয়েছে।
  • Completed: production-related handling complete হয়েছে।
  • Cancelled: order cancel হয়েছে বা আর handle করার দরকার নেই।

দৈনন্দিন কাজে আগে handle করা সবচেয়ে জরুরি:

Production Arrangement Status = Pending

docs.title: Order খুলে Elastic Order Details আগে দেখুন
docs.text:
Order খুলে Production Department মূলত product details দেখবে:

  • Elastic Code
  • Elastic Type
  • Description
  • Elastic Color
  • Target Color Ref.
  • Order Ref.
  • Width
  • Width Unit
  • Net Weight
  • Quantity
  • Quantity Unit
  • Production Routing
  • Remarks
  • Product Picture

এই fields Production Department-কে বুঝতে সাহায্য করে:

  • কোন item বানাতে হবে?
  • কোন color দরকার?
  • কত width?
  • কত quantity?
  • কোন production routing ব্যবহার হবে?
  • কোনো picture বা special remark আছে কি?

docs.title: প্রশ্ন ২: Elastic Order No. জানা না থাকলে Production Department কীভাবে দ্রুত sales order information খুঁজবে?
সহজ উত্তর
docs.text:
Elastic Order No. জানা না থাকলে শুরুতেই order number খুঁজবেন না।

এই filter order ব্যবহার করুন:

Production Arrangement Status → Job Type → Responsible Sales → Customer Code / Company Name → Expected Delivery Date → Elastic Code / Color / Width / Order Ref.

docs.title: Step 1: আগে production arrangement status filter করুন
docs.text:
প্রতিদিন আগে দেখুন:

Production Arrangement Status = Pending

এর মানে: এই orders এখনও arrange করা হয়নি এবং Production Department-এর action দরকার।

Already arranged orders দেখতে:

Production Arrangement Status = Scheduled

Completed orders খুঁজতে:

Production Arrangement Status = Completed

docs.title: Step 2: Sample এবং Bulk আলাদা করুন
docs.text:
এই field দেখুন:

Job Type

Sample order খুঁজতে:

Job Type = Sample

Bulk order খুঁজতে:

Job Type = Bulk

Sample এবং Bulk আলাদা রাখলে data অনেক পরিষ্কার থাকে।

docs.title: Step 3: Sales person দিয়ে filter করুন
docs.text:
কোনো sales person order সম্পর্কে জিজ্ঞেস করলে কিন্তু order number না জানলে আগে filter করুন:

Responsible Sales = সংশ্লিষ্ট sales person

Example:

Responsible Sales = Pete

এতে order list ওই sales person-এর orders-এ সীমিত হয়ে যায়।

docs.title: Step 4: Customer দিয়ে filter করুন
docs.text:
এরপর filter করুন:

Customer Code

অথবা:

Company Name

Customer code জানা থাকলে আগে Customer Code ব্যবহার করুন।

Customer code জানা না থাকলে Company Name দিয়ে search করুন।

docs.title: Step 5: Delivery date দিয়ে filter করুন
docs.text:
Production scheduling-এর জন্য গুরুত্বপূর্ণ field:

Expected Delivery Date

আপনি filter করতে পারেন:

  • Today
  • This week
  • Next 7 days
  • Next 30 days
  • Specific date

যে order-এর delivery date সবচেয়ে কাছে, সেটি আগে handle করুন।

docs.title: Step 6: Product information দিয়ে exact item খুঁজুন
docs.text:
একই customer-এর অনেক order থাকলে product information ব্যবহার করুন:

  • Elastic Code
  • Elastic Color
  • Width
  • Order Ref.
  • Customer PO No.
  • Production Routing

Common filter combinations:

  • Pending + Sample + Responsible Sales + Customer Code
  • Pending + Bulk + Customer Code + Expected Delivery Date
  • Customer Code + Width + Elastic Color
  • Responsible Sales + Customer Code + Order Ref.

docs.title: Daily operation flow
docs.text:
Production Department প্রতিদিন এভাবে কাজ করতে পারে:

  1. Elastic Order Request খুলুন।
  2. Production Arrangement Status = Pending filter করুন।
  3. Job Type = Sample বা Job Type = Bulk filter করুন।
  4. Expected Delivery Date অনুযায়ী sort করুন।
  5. Responsible Sales এবং Customer Code দেখুন।
  6. Order খুলে Elastic Order Details দেখুন।
  7. Arrange করা সম্ভব হলে Production Arrangement Status কে Scheduled করুন।
  8. Complete হলে Completed করুন।
  9. Cancelled order হলে Cancelled করুন।

এই ৪টি প্রশ্ন clear হলে Production Department দ্রুত ঠিক করতে পারে order কীভাবে handle করতে হবে।

docs.title: Customer Sample Analysis ব্যবহার নির্দেশিকা — বাংলা
1. Form-এর উদ্দেশ্য
docs.text:
Customer Sample Analysis হলো Production Department-এর customer elastic sample technical analysis form।

এই form-এ record করা হয়:

  • sample structure, weaving method, width, thickness, handfeel, elongation এবং weight;
  • material composition এবং Sample Composition Breakdown;
  • BOM material, ends, consumption, dyeing requirement, dyeing process এবং color information;
  • customer sample image, analysis photo বা reference attachment।

Record add করার পরে automation analysis result existing Elastic Item Master-এর OS technical data এবং sample composition information-এ write back করে।

এই form sales order form নয়। ব্যবসায়িক/নিষ্পত্তি সংক্রান্ত তথ্য বা production schedule এই form-এ লিখবেন না।

docs.title: 2. কারা এবং কখন ব্যবহার করবেন
docs.text:
Main users: Production Department।

আলাদা Design Department নেই। Production users including designers একই account এবং permission structure ব্যবহার করে।

ব্যবহার করুন যখন:

  1. customer physical sample analysis-এর জন্য দেয়;
  2. customer photo বা existing Elastic information দেয় এবং technical information complete করতে হয়;
  3. Production users customer sample-এর material composition এবং OS BOM তৈরি করতে চায়;
  4. sample analysis result existing Elastic Item Master-এ write back করতে হয়।

docs.title: 3. বর্তমান process
docs.text:
• এই form-এ বর্তমানে workflow নেই।
  • এই form automation assistant দিয়ে existing Elastic Item Master update করে।
  • এই form শুধু existing record-এ write back করে। নতুন Elastic Item Master তৈরি করে না।

docs.title: 4. Basic Order Information
docs.text:
এই field-গুলো analysis কোন customer এবং কোন Elastic product master data-এর সাথে যুক্ত তা identify করে।

Field Employee guidance Select Elastic সঠিক existing Elastic / Elastic Item Master record নির্বাচন করুন। Customer Code Elastic Item Master write back-এর key matching field; random change করবেন না। Elastic Code Elastic Item Master write back-এর key matching field; random change করবেন না। Country Customer country বা region; selection-এর পরে check করুন। Responsible Sales Traceability-এর জন্য responsible salesperson। Description Sample বা existing data অনুযায়ী product description। Elastic Type System-এ current option থেকে নির্বাচন করুন। Sales Account Ownership এবং visibility related field; ভুল selection data ownership প্রভাবিত করতে পারে।

Operating rules:

  1. আগে সঠিক Select Elastic নির্বাচন করুন।
  2. Save করার আগে Customer Code এবং Elastic Code, target Elastic Item Master-এর সাথে match করে কিনা check করুন।
  3. Customer Code বা Elastic Code unclear হলে stop করুন এবং supervisor বা Jodoo Admin-কে জিজ্ঞাসা করুন।

docs.title: 5. Basic Analysis Information
docs.text:
এই field-গুলো sample-এর technical analysis result record করে।

Field Employee guidance Analysis No. Traceability-এর জন্য analysis number। Accountable Designer Analysis-এর জন্য responsible production/design user। Attachment Customer sample image, analysis photo বা reference material upload করুন। Elastic Category System-এ current option থেকে নির্বাচন করুন। Structure Actual sample structure অনুযায়ী লিখুন। Weaving Method Actual weaving method অনুযায়ী লিখুন। Woven Pattern Woven pattern বা structure note। Knitted Pattern Knitted pattern বা structure note। Elastic Name Sample বা product name। Elastic Letter Sample letter বা marker। Handfeel Handfeel description। Greige Width / Greige Width Unit Greige width এবং unit। Finish Width / Finish Width Unit Finished width এবং unit। Thickness (mm) Thickness in mm। Weft Density (pick/cm) Weft density in pick/cm। Greige Elongation Greige elongation। Finish Elongation Finished elongation। Sample Weight (g/m) প্রতি meter sample weight। Created At Creation time বা analysis record time।

Guidance:

  • Actual sample analysis অনুযায়ী field পূরণ করুন। Uncertain data guess করবেন না।
  • Width, thickness, elongation এবং weight যতটা সম্ভব accurate রাখুন।
  • Attachment analysis conclusion support করা উচিত।

docs.title: 6. Customer Sample Material Analysis
docs.text:
Subform name: Sample Composition Breakdown।

এক row একটি material বা material position বোঝায়। এক row-তে একাধিক material মেশাবেন না।

Field Employee guidance Position Material position বা structural position। Select Material সঠিক material record নির্বাচন করুন। Item Code অবশ্যই সঠিক হতে হবে; unsure হলে supervisor-কে জিজ্ঞাসা করুন। Item Category System data বা linked data থেকে confirm করুন। Material Type Material type। Standard Item Name Standard material name। 材料中文名 System material Chinese name; exact system label preserve করুন। Base Unit Base unit। Brand Brand। No. of Ends Number of ends। Unit Consumption (g/m) প্রতি meter consumption; BOM এবং later usage judgment প্রভাবিত করে। Need Dyeing? Material dyeing দরকার কিনা decide করুন। Dyeing Process Dyeing দরকার হলে fill করুন। Color Name Color name। Target Color Ref. Target color reference। Quality Reference Type Quality reference type। Quality Reference No. Quality reference number। Remarks Notes। Confirm Status Row confirmed কিনা mark করে; unconfirmed row final BOM হিসেবে ব্যবহার করবেন না। 单行BOM信息打包 System packing field। Manually edit করবেন না।

docs.title: 7. Analysis record তৈরি
docs.text:
1. Customer Sample Analysis খুলুন।
  2. New ক্লিক করুন।
  3. Select Elastic-এ সঠিক existing Elastic record নির্বাচন করুন।
  4. Customer Code এবং Elastic Code check করুন।
  5. Country, Responsible Sales, Description, Elastic Type এবং Sales Account check করুন।
  6. Analysis No., Accountable Designer এবং Attachment পূরণ করুন।
  7. Actual sample অনুযায়ী structure, weaving method, pattern, name, handfeel, width, thickness, elongation এবং weight পূরণ করুন।
  8. Sample Composition Breakdown-এ material composition row by row পূরণ করুন।
  9. Item Code, No. of Ends, Unit Consumption (g/m), Need Dyeing?, Dyeing Process, Color Name এবং Target Color Ref. check করুন।
  10. Confirmed material row-এর জন্য সঠিক Confirm Status set করুন।
  11. Save করার আগে Customer Code, Elastic Code এবং BOM information আবার check করুন।

docs.title: 8. Save করার পরে কী হবে
docs.text:
Confirmed automation assistant:

  • Automation name: 材料分析表填写 写回 总表单
  • Trigger form: Customer Sample Analysis
  • Trigger condition: new record Add record
  • Action: existing Elastic Item Master update
  • Matching conditions:
  • Elastic Item Master.Customer Code = Customer Sample Analysis.Customer Code
  • Elastic Item Master.Elastic Code = Customer Sample Analysis.Elastic Code

Important rules:

  • Existing Elastic Item Master match না হলে system automatically নতুন record create করবে না।
  • Customer Sample Analysis শুধু existing Elastic Item Master record-এ write back করে।
  • তাই Customer Code এবং Elastic Code accurate হওয়া জরুরি।

docs.title: 9. Elastic Item Master-এর সাথে সম্পর্ক
docs.text:
Customer Sample Analysis, Elastic Item Master-এর OS technical data এবং sample material composition-এর important source।

Confirmed OS technical field writeback includes, but is not limited to:

  • Ref. Analysis No. = Analysis No.
  • Accountable Designer = Accountable Designer
  • Attachment (OS) = Attachment
  • Elastic Category (OS) = Elastic Category
  • Structure (OS) = Structure
  • Weaving Method (OS) = Weaving Method
  • Woven Pattern (OS) = Woven Pattern
  • Knitted Pattern (OS) = Knitted Pattern
  • Elastic Name (OS) = Elastic Name
  • Handfeel (OS) = Handfeel
  • Greige Width (OS) = Greige Width
  • Greige Width Unit (OS) = Greige Width Unit
  • Finish Width (OS) = Finish Width
  • Finish Width Unit (OS) = Finish Width Unit
  • Thickness (mm) (OS) = Thickness (mm)
  • Weft Density (pick/cm) (OS) = Weft Density (pick/cm)
  • Greige Elongation (OS) = Greige Elongation
  • Finish Elongation (OS) = Finish Elongation
  • Sample Weight (g/m) (OS) = Sample Weight (g/m)
  • Created At (OS) = Created At
  • 全局BOM字符串集合 = 全局BOM字符串集合, field থাকলে

docs.title: 10. সাধারণ ভুল
docs.text:
• ভুল Select Elastic নির্বাচন করা।
  • Customer Code বা Elastic Code target Elastic Item Master-এর সাথে match না করা।
  • Uncertain technical data guess করা।
  • এক row-তে একাধিক material মেশানো।
  • ভুল Item Code নির্বাচন করা।
  • Unit Consumption (g/m)-এর বদলে total quantity লেখা।
  • Need Dyeing? ভুল judge করা।
  • Dyeing দরকার হলে Dyeing Process, Color Name বা Target Color Ref. খালি রাখা।
  • Unconfirmed Confirm Status row final BOM হিসেবে ব্যবহার করা।
  • Attachment upload না করা, ফলে sample source trace করা কঠিন হয়।

docs.title: 11. Out of scope
docs.text:
এই form ব্যবহার করা হয় না:

  • sales order;
  • ব্যবসায়িক/নিষ্পত্তি সংক্রান্ত তথ্য;
  • production scheduling;
  • নতুন Elastic Item Master তৈরি করতে।

docs.title: 12. সংস্করণ ইতিহাস

docs.title: Elastic Customer ব্যবহার নির্দেশিকা — বাংলা
docs.text:
语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

Version Updated Status v0.1 2026-06-22 Published

docs.title: 1. Form-এর উদ্দেশ্য
docs.text:
Elastic Customer হলো Elastic business-এর customer master-data form। এটি order form বা product form নয়।

এই form-এ রাখা হয়:

  • customer company এবং sales ownership;
  • contact ও communication information;
  • billing এবং banking information;
  • logistics এবং delivery information।

নতুন customer প্রথমবার system-এ এলে আগে Elastic Customer record তৈরি করুন। পরবর্তী form-গুলো এখান থেকে customer নির্বাচন করে অনুমোদিত customer information ব্যবহার করবে।

docs.title: 2. কারা এবং কখন ব্যবহার করবেন
docs.text:
• Sales: customer তৈরি করে এবং company, ownership, contact ও delivery information রক্ষণাবেক্ষণ করে।
  • Management: customer Grade এবং master data পরীক্ষা করে।
  • Admin: form structure, permission এবং linked-form configuration রক্ষণাবেক্ষণ করে।

ব্যবহার করুন যখন:

  1. নতুন customer system-এ আসে;
  2. company, sales ownership, contact, bank বা address information পরিবর্তিত হয়;
  3. product, order, delivery, billing বা follow-up record-এ customer information প্রয়োজন হয়।

docs.title: 3. বর্তমান process
docs.text:
• এই form-এ বর্তমানে workflow নেই।
  • এই form-এ বর্তমানে automation assistant নেই।
  • Save করার আগে data entry করা ব্যক্তি সব information পরীক্ষা করবেন।

docs.title: 4. Required field
docs.text:
Field-এর উপরের-বাম পাশে লাল * থাকলে field-টি required।

  • Company Name: customer-এর formal full company name লিখুন; short name লিখবেন না।
  • Responsible Sales: সঠিক দায়িত্বপ্রাপ্ত salesperson নির্বাচন করুন।
  • Sales Account: সঠিক system member নির্বাচন করুন; এটি permission, ownership এবং পরবর্তী linked form-কে প্রভাবিত করে।
  • Country(Region): customer-এর সঠিক country বা region নির্বাচন করুন।

docs.title: 5. Customer Basic Info
docs.text:
• Customer Code: system automatically generate করে; manually edit করবেন না।
  • Company Name: PI, Contract এবং official document-এ ব্যবহৃত formal full name।
  • Short Name: internal identification-এর জন্য।
  • Responsible Sales: দায়িত্বপ্রাপ্ত salesperson।
  • Sales Account: required Member field; ownership, permission এবং linked form-এর জন্য গুরুত্বপূর্ণ।
  • Customer Type, Customer Source, Customer Tag: system-এ বর্তমানে দেখানো option নির্বাচন করুন।
  • Country(Region): সঠিক country বা region নির্বাচন করুন।
  • BIN: Business Identification Number; Bangladesh customer-এর ক্ষেত্রে ব্যবহার হতে পারে।
  • Factory Address এবং Office Address: verified address লিখুন।
  • Grade: management field; অনুমতি ছাড়া ordinary employee পরিবর্তন করবেন না।

Customer Code-এর numbering rule বা dropdown option অনুমান করবেন না।

docs.title: 6. Contact Information
docs.text:
Main contact field:

  • Main Contact Name
  • Position
  • Phone Number
  • E-mail

Other Contacts subform-এ প্রতি row-তে একজন additional contact লিখুন:

  • Name
  • Position
  • Phone
  • Email

Contact name, phone এবং email যতটা সম্ভব সম্পূর্ণ ও updated রাখুন।

docs.title: 7. Billing & Banking
docs.text:
Main field:

  • Bank Name
  • Account No
  • Swift Code
  • Routing
  • Bank Address
  • Bank Country
  • Account Currency
  • Intermediary Bank Required?

নিয়ম:

  1. customer বা bank-এর reliable document ব্যবহার করুন।
  2. Bank Country হলো beneficiary bank-এর country।
  3. customer বা beneficiary bank intermediary/correspondent bank চাইলে তবেই Intermediary Bank Required নির্বাচন করুন।
  4. প্রয়োজন হলে Intermediary Bank Details subform-এ SWIFT/BIC, Bank Name, Bank Address, Country এবং Currency Served লিখুন।
  5. অস্পষ্ট banking information অনুমান করবেন না; customer, Finance বা Management-এর সাথে যাচাই করুন।

docs.title: 8. Logistics & Delivery
docs.text:
Main field:

  • Default Delivery Address
  • Consignee Name
  • Main Contact
  • Position
  • Phone Number
  • E-mail

Other Contacts subform:

  • Name
  • Position
  • Phone
  • Email

Default delivery address, consignee এবং delivery contact সঠিক রাখুন। Delivery information পরিবর্তিত হলে পরবর্তী delivery document ব্যবহারের আগে customer master record update করুন।

docs.title: 9. নতুন customer তৈরি
docs.text:
1. duplicate এড়াতে Company Name, Short Name বা Customer Code দিয়ে search করুন।
  2. New ক্লিক করুন।
  3. Company Name-এ formal full company name লিখুন।
  4. সঠিক Responsible Sales এবং Sales Account নির্বাচন করুন।
  5. সঠিক Country(Region) নির্বাচন করুন।
  6. verified information থেকে type, source, tag, BIN এবং address পূরণ করুন।
  7. main contact লিখুন এবং Other Contacts-এর প্রতি row-তে একজন contact দিন।
  8. reliable document থাকলে Billing & Banking পূরণ করুন।
  9. default delivery address, consignee এবং logistics contact পূরণ করুন।
  10. Save করার আগে required field, contact, bank এবং delivery information পরীক্ষা করুন।

docs.title: 10. Existing customer update
docs.text:
1. Customer Code বা Company Name দিয়ে existing record খুঁজুন; duplicate তৈরি করবেন না।
  2. শুধু verified information পরিবর্তন করুন।
  3. Responsible Sales বা Sales Account পরিবর্তনের আগে নতুন ownership নিশ্চিত করুন।
  4. bank, phone, email বা delivery information পরিবর্তনের সময় customer-এর latest confirmed document ব্যবহার করুন।
  5. Company rule অনুযায়ী Management/Admin Grade রক্ষণাবেক্ষণ করবে।

docs.title: 11. অন্যান্য form-এর সাথে সম্পর্ক
docs.text:
• Elastic Update by Designer-এর Select Elastic Customer, Elastic Customer-এর সাথে linked।
  • বর্তমানে confirmed linked field: Customer Code, Company Name, Responsible Sales এবং Country(Region)।
  • Elastic Item Master-এর Customer, Elastic Customer থেকে আসে।
  • Sales Account পরবর্তী customer, product এবং business data ownership-কে প্রভাবিত করে।

docs.title: 12. সাধারণ ভুল এবং data safety
docs.text:
• Company Name-এ short name লেখা।
  • ভুল Responsible Sales, Sales Account বা Country(Region) নির্বাচন করা।
  • duplicate customer তৈরি করা।
  • পুরোনো contact বা delivery information রেখে দেওয়া।
  • অসম্পূর্ণ banking information অনুমান করা।
  • management approval ছাড়া Grade পরিবর্তন করা।

কোনো public manual, training screenshot বা example-এ real customer name, bank account, phone, email বা delivery address ব্যবহার করবেন না।

docs.title: সংস্করণ ইতিহাস
docs.text: Date Version Change 2026-06-22 0.1 First customer master-data guide based on the confirmed field list and blank form screenshots.

docs.title: Elastic Item Master ব্যবহার নির্দেশিকা — বাংলা
docs.text:
语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

Version Updated Status v0.5 2026-06-22 Published

docs.title: Elastic Item Master ব্যবহার নির্দেশিকা — বাংলা
1. Form-এর উদ্দেশ্য
docs.text:
Elastic Item Master হলো Elastic product-এর master-data form।

বর্তমান নিশ্চিত নিয়ম: একটি record = একজন customer-এর অধীনে একটি Elastic product। একই record-এ একাধিক product রাখবেন না।

এই form-এ customer ও product specification, Original Sample (OS) analysis/BOM এবং Final Base Sample (FBS) specification/BOM রাখা হয়।

docs.title: 2. কারা ব্যবহার করবেন
docs.text:
• Designer Department: product specification, OS analysis এবং BOM পূরণ বা পরীক্ষা করবে।
  • Sales Department: customer, Responsible Sales, Sales Account এবং product data পরীক্ষা করবে।
  • Jodoo Admin: permission, field, formula এবং automation রক্ষণাবেক্ষণ করবে।

docs.title: 3. তিনটি Tab
docs.text:
1. Elastic Specification — customer, ownership এবং basic product specification।
  2. Elastic Sample Analysis — Original Sample analysis, technical data এবং OS BOM।
  3. Elastic FBS Record — final approved standard এবং FBS BOM।

OS ও FBS আলাদা রাখুন; একটি দিয়ে অন্যটি overwrite করবেন না।

docs.title: 4. দৈনন্দিন ধাপ
docs.text:
1. duplicate record এড়াতে আগে customer ও product search করুন।
  2. Select Data ব্যবহার করে Elastic Customer থেকে Customer নির্বাচন করুন।
  3. Customer Code, Company Name এবং Country পরীক্ষা করুন।
  4. Responsible Sales পূরণ করে সঠিক Sales Account নির্বাচন করুন।
  5. product specification পূরণ করুন।
  6. কাজের পর্যায় অনুযায়ী OS অথবা FBS Tab পূরণ করুন।
  7. BOM-এ প্রতি material এক row-তে লিখে unit, ends ও consumption পরীক্ষা করুন।
  8. Save করার আগে Customer, Sales Account, specification এবং BOM আবার পরীক্ষা করুন।

docs.title: 5. Sales Account কেন গুরুত্বপূর্ণ
docs.text:
Sales Account একটি Member field। এটি record ownership, Publish permission এবং visibility নিয়ন্ত্রণ করে। কোন account record দেখতে পারবে তা Sales Account নির্ধারণ করে।

Bangladesh Sales Team একটি shared Sales Account ব্যবহার করতে পারে। China sales user-রা individual Sales Account ব্যবহার করতে পারে।

docs.title: 6. OS এবং FBS BOM
docs.text:
OS customer-এর original analysis সংরক্ষণ করে। FBS final approved standard সংরক্ষণ করে। উভয় BOM-এ বর্তমানে এই field group আছে:

  • material selection ও identity fields
  • No. of Ends এবং Unit Consumption (g/m)
  • dyeing, color ও quality reference fields
  • Remarks এবং Confirm Status

শেষ system field OS-এর জন্য 单行BOM信息打包 এবং FBS-এর জন্য FBS单行BOM信息打包। বর্তমান OS/FBS BOM-এ Light Source নেই।

docs.title: 7. Elastic Update by Designer-এর সম্পর্ক
docs.text:
Elastic Update by Designer product information সংগ্রহ বা সম্পূরক করে; existing Elastic Item Master সরাসরি edit করে না।

Sales Confirmation = Confirm এবং Sales Account খালি না থাকলে enabled automation নতুন Elastic Item Master record Add করে এবং একটি Common BOM, OS BOM ও FBS BOM—দুই জায়গায় copy করে। Reject হলে sync হয় না।

docs.title: 8. সাধারণ ভুল
docs.text:
• একই customer/product-এর duplicate record তৈরি করা।
  • একটি record-এ একাধিক Elastic product রাখা।
  • Sales Account ফাঁকা রাখা বা ভুল account নির্বাচন করা।
  • OS data-কে final FBS হিসেবে ব্যবহার করা।
  • ভুল material, unit, ends বা consumption দেওয়া।
  • system-generated field manually edit করা।

docs.title: Elastic Order Request ব্যবহার নির্দেশিকা — বাংলা
docs.text:
语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

Version Updated Status v0.1 2026-06-24 Published

docs.title: Elastic Order Request ব্যবহার নির্দেশিকা — বাংলা
1. Form-এর উদ্দেশ্য
docs.text:
Elastic Order Request হলো Elastic sales order এবং sample request entry form।

Sales users এই form-এ record করে:

  • customer এবং order information;
  • Job Type, Billing Type, customer PO এবং expected delivery date;
  • Elastic Order Details-এ product details, quantity, color, width এবং production routing;
  • attachment এবং remarks।

Production users এই form production arrangement view থেকে দেখে। তারা mainly approval result, expected delivery date, product details এবং Production Arrangement Status check করে order pending, scheduled, completed না cancelled তা judge করে।

এই form Elastic Sales Order helper table-এ sync করার source, এবং Sample request approve হলে Elastic Sample Development Work Order create করার source।

docs.title: 2. কারা এবং কখন ব্যবহার করবেন
docs.text:
Main users:

  • Sales
  • Production
  • Management

আলাদা Design Department নেই। Designer involve হলে তাকে production users including designers হিসেবে ধরতে হবে, Production account এবং permission structure-এর অধীনে।

ব্যবহার করুন যখন:

  1. Sales customer sample request বা bulk order পায়।
  2. Sales customer, order, product details, quantity, delivery date এবং attachment enter করতে চায়।
  3. Supervisor workflow-তে order approve করতে হবে।
  4. Job Type = Sample এবং supervisor approval হলে sample development work order create হওয়া দরকার।
  5. Production order-এর production arrangement status track করতে চায়।

docs.title: 3. বর্তমান workflow
docs.text:
Current workflow:

  1. Enter Order Details
  2. Supervisor Approval
  3. End

Supervisor Approval একটি Regular Approval node। Daily users-এর জন্য মূল কথা: order information complete করুন, supervisor approval submit করুন, approval-এর পরে downstream handling continue করুন।

docs.title: 4. Production Arrangement Status
docs.text:
Production Arrangement Status Production-কে production planning বা arrangement view থেকে order status বুঝতে সাহায্য করে।

Option Meaning Pending Order আছে, কিন্তু production এখনো arrange বা confirm হয়নি। Scheduled Production arrange হয়েছে, অথবা sample/bulk follow-up handling-এ ঢুকেছে। Completed Production-related handling complete। Cancelled Order cancel বা continue হবে না।

Production users সাধারণত Approval Result = Approve এবং Production Arrangement Status = Pending record আগে দেখবে।

docs.title: 5. Sales entry steps
docs.text:
1. Elastic Order Request খুলুন।
  2. Select Customer-এ সঠিক customer নির্বাচন করুন।
  3. Customer Code, Company Name, Country, Responsible Sales এবং Sales Account check করুন।
  4. Current system options থেকে সঠিক Job Type নির্বাচন করুন, যেমন Sample বা Bulk।
  5. Current system options থেকে সঠিক Billing Type নির্বাচন করুন, যেমন FOC বা CHG।
  6. Customer PO No., Purchase Order Date এবং Expected Delivery Date পূরণ করুন।
  7. Attachment-এ customer order file, image, specification drawing বা reference upload করুন।
  8. Elastic Order Details-এ product line পূরণ করুন।
  9. Different style, color, width বা customer requirement হলে আলাদা detail line ব্যবহার করুন।
  10. Production Routing careful selection করুন, কারণ এটি sample বা bulk handling প্রভাবিত করে।
  11. Supervisor approval submit করুন।

docs.title: 6. Sales Order Information
docs.text:
এই field-গুলো customer, order source, sales ownership এবং production arrangement status identify করে।

Field Employee guidance Select Customer সঠিক customer record নির্বাচন করুন। Customer Code Customer code; later sync এবং lookup-এ ব্যবহার হয়। Company Name Customer company name; customer select করার পরে check করুন। Country Customer country বা region। BIN Business Identification Number, applicable হলে। Responsible Sales Responsible salesperson। Sales Account Ownership এবং permission related field; অবশ্যই সঠিক হতে হবে। Job Type Sample / Bulk এবং অন্য work type আলাদা করে; current system options ব্যবহার করুন। Billing Type FOC / CHG এবং অন্য billing type আলাদা করে; current system options ব্যবহার করুন। Customer PO No. Customer PO বা reference number। Purchase Order Date Customer order date। Attachment Customer order, image, specification drawing বা reference material। Expected Delivery Date Expected delivery date; Production এটি careful check করে। Remarks Order remarks। Elastic Order No. System order number বা internal order number; lookup এবং sync-এ ব্যবহার হয়। Production Arrangement Status Production arrangement status।

docs.title: 7. Elastic Order Details
docs.text:
Elastic Order Details হলো product detail subform। এক row একটি Elastic style বা product detail বোঝায়।

Field Employee guidance Select Elastic Related Elastic product record নির্বাচন করুন। Elastic Code Elastic product code; later sync এবং lookup-এ ব্যবহার হয়। Elastic Type System data বা current options থেকে confirm করুন। Description Product description। Elastic Color Color। Target Color Ref. Target color reference। Order Ref. Customer order-এর product reference। Width / Width Unit Width এবং unit। Net Weight Net weight, applicable হলে। Quantity / Quantity Unit Quantity এবং unit। Production Routing Production routing; Production এটি careful check করে। Remarks Product detail remarks। Product Picture Product image বা reference picture। Billing Type(辅助) System helper field, main-form Billing Type-এর সমান। Work Type(辅助) System helper field, main-form Job Type-এর সমান।

Sales commercial বা settlement-related field company permission এবং process অনুযায়ী fill করতে হবে। Production users যদি production handling-এর জন্য দরকার নেই এমন commercial/settlement field দেখতে পায়, edit করবে না এবং Admin বা Alen-কে permission issue জানাবে।

docs.title: 8. Production কীভাবে order দ্রুত filter করবে
docs.text:
Production যদি Elastic Order No. না জানে, শুধু order number দিয়ে search করবেন না। এই order-এ filter করুন:

  1. Responsible Sales দিয়ে filter করুন।
  2. Job Type = Sample / Bulk দিয়ে filter করুন।
  3. Customer Code বা Company Name দিয়ে filter করুন।
  4. Production Arrangement Status দিয়ে filter করুন।
  5. Expected Delivery Date দিয়ে filter করুন।
  6. তারপর Elastic Code, Order Ref., Width বা Elastic Color দিয়ে specific product line খুঁজুন।

Production-এর সবচেয়ে দরকারি field:

  • Approval Result
  • Production Arrangement Status
  • Job Type
  • Expected Delivery Date
  • Responsible Sales
  • Customer Code
  • Company Name
  • Elastic Order No.
  • Customer PO No.
  • Elastic Code
  • Elastic Color
  • Width
  • Quantity
  • Production Routing

Recommended Production display fields: Approval Result, Production Arrangement Status, Job Type, Expected Delivery Date, Responsible Sales, Customer Code, Company Name, Elastic Order No., Customer PO No., Submission Time বা Purchase Order Date। এটি recommended configuration; system view already configured হয়েছে এমন confirmation নয়।

docs.title: 9. Review & Approval
docs.text:
Approval field supervisor-কে order continue করা যাবে কিনা decide করতে সাহায্য করে।

Field Meaning Risk Assessment Risk assessment। PO Status PO status। Funding Status Funding status। L/C Readiness L/C readiness। Priority Priority। Remarks Approval remarks। Order Approval Order approval field। Approval Result Approval result। Approval Time Approval time। Approver Approver। Reason for Rejection Rejection reason।

Order reject হলে Reason for Rejection check করুন এবং supervisor instruction follow করে continue করুন।

docs.title: 10. Production Status
docs.text:
Production status fields:

  • Sample Status
  • Bulk Production Status

এই field-গুলো sample এবং bulk production follow-up handling track করে। Current system options ব্যবহার করুন।

docs.title: 11. Save বা approval-এর পরে কী হবে
docs.text:
Confirmed automation relationships:

  1. 松紧带销售订单更新到辅助表, Elastic Order Request data Elastic Sales Order helper table-এ sync করে।
  2. Job Type = Sample এবং Supervisor Approval approved হলে, 松紧带生产申请 批准后 生成松紧带样板Work Card, Elastic Sample Development Work Order create করে।

Employee reminders:

  • Customer Code, Elastic Order No. এবং Elastic Code sync এবং matching প্রভাবিত করে।
  • ভুল Job Type sample work order create না হওয়া বা wrong downstream process ঘটাতে পারে।
  • ভুল Production Routing production/sample handling প্রভাবিত করে।

docs.title: 12. সাধারণ ভুল
docs.text:
• ভুল Select Customer নির্বাচন করা।
  • Sample এবং Bulk-এর মধ্যে ভুল Job Type নির্বাচন করা।
  • ভুল Billing Type নির্বাচন করা।
  • Expected Delivery Date খালি বা inaccurate রাখা।
  • এক Elastic Order Details row-তে different style, color বা width মেশানো।
  • Production Routing careful selection না করা।
  • Customer order, image বা specification attachment upload না করা।
  • Production শুধু order number দিয়ে search করে order খুঁজে না পাওয়া; combined filter ব্যবহার করুন।
  • Unapproved order confirmed production order হিসেবে handle করা।

docs.title: Elastic Update by Designer ব্যবহার নির্দেশিকা — বাংলা
1. Form-এর উদ্দেশ্য
docs.text:
Elastic Update by Designer একটি workflow form। Designer Department নির্দিষ্ট Customer এবং Sales Account-এর Elastic product information ও Common BOM Details সংগ্রহ বা সম্পূরক করে।

Sales Department Confirm করার পরে enabled automation Elastic Item Master-এ নতুন record Add করে। এই form existing Item Master record সরাসরি edit করে না।

docs.title: 2. কারা ব্যবহার করবেন
docs.text:
• Designer Department: Customer ও Sales Account নির্বাচন করে product information এবং Common BOM পূরণ করে।
  • Sales Department: সব information পরীক্ষা করে Confirm অথবা Reject নির্বাচন করে।
  • Jodoo Admin: workflow, permission, formula অথবা automation problem পরীক্ষা করে।

ব্যবহারের entry ও data range:

  • Sales - Elastic Update Records: Marketing Department ব্যবহার করে।
  • Designer - My Elastic Update by Designer: Production Department ব্যবহার করে।
  • Designer-এর data range Sales Account = Current User অনুযায়ী নিয়ন্ত্রিত হয়।

docs.title: 3. বর্তমান workflow
docs.text:
1. Designer Editing
  2. Sales Review & Confirmation
  3. End

Designer Sales Confirmation, Reject Reason অথবা Approval Time পরিবর্তন করবে না। Reject করলে Sales Department-কে Reject Reason লিখতে হবে।

docs.title: 4. পূরণের নীতি
docs.text:
• Select Elastic Customer, Elastic Customer form-এর সাথে linked।
  • Customer নির্বাচন করার পরে Customer Code, Company Name, Responsible Sales এবং Country(Region) automatically পূরণ হয়।
  • Sales Account একটি required Member field। Selectable user Marketing Department থেকে আসে।
  • Field-এর উপরের-বাম পাশে লাল * থাকলে field-টি required।
  • Dropdown field-এ system-এ বর্তমানে দেখানো option নির্বাচন করুন।
  • Product information যতটা সম্ভব সম্পূর্ণ করুন।
  • Common BOM সত্যভাবে লিখুন; অজানা information অনুমান না করে খালি রাখুন।
  • Global BOM string collection, FBS single-row BOM packing এবং একই ধরনের field system calculation/packing field। Manually edit করবেন না।

docs.title: 5. Review field দেখানোর নিয়ম
docs.text:
• Sales Confirmation = Confirm হলে Approval Time দেখা যায়।
  • Sales Confirmation = Reject হলে Reject Reason দেখা যায়।
  • Reject করার সময় Reject Reason লিখুন।

docs.title: 6. Common BOM Details
docs.text: Common BOM Details, Elastic Item Master-এর Sample Composition Breakdown (OS) এবং Sample Composition Breakdown (FBS)-এ synchronize হয়। Field name একই থাকে এবং একই নামের field পরস্পরের সাথে synchronize হয়।

docs.title: 7. Designer-এর ধাপ
docs.text:
1. Elastic Update by Designer খুলে New ক্লিক করুন।
  2. Select Elastic Customer থেকে Customer নির্বাচন করুন।
  3. Customer Code, Company Name, Responsible Sales এবং Country(Region) পরীক্ষা করুন।
  4. সঠিক Sales Account নির্বাচন করুন।
  5. product type, description, color, width, unit, net weight এবং remarks পূরণ করুন।
  6. Common BOM-এ জানা material information প্রতি row-তে লিখুন।
  7. material, unit, ends, consumption, dyeing এবং quality reference পরীক্ষা করুন।
  8. review field বা system-packed field পরিবর্তন করবেন না।
  9. Sales Review & Confirmation-এর জন্য submit করুন।

docs.title: 8. Sales review
docs.text:
1. Customer এবং Sales Account পরীক্ষা করুন।
  2. product specification ও unit পরীক্ষা করুন।
  3. প্রতিটি Common BOM row পরীক্ষা করুন।
  4. সব ঠিক হলে Confirm নির্বাচন করুন।
  5. ভুল বা অসম্পূর্ণ হলে Reject নির্বাচন করে Reject Reason লিখুন।

docs.title: 9. Review-এর পরে কী হবে
docs.text:
Automation enabled। Update Record-এ বর্তমান নিশ্চিত condition হলো Sales Confirmation = Confirm এবং Sales Account is not empty।

Assistant নতুন Elastic Item Master record Add করে। Common BOM Details, Sample Composition Breakdown (OS) এবং Sample Composition Breakdown (FBS)-এ synchronize হয়; একই নামের field synchronize হয়। Reject হলে synchronize হয় না।

docs.title: 10. সাধারণ ভুল
docs.text:
• Customer নির্বাচন করা হয়নি অথবা Sales Account খালি/ভুল।
  • Width, weight অথবা Unit Consumption-এর unit ভুল।
  • অজানা BOM information অনুমান করে লেখা।
  • Designer review field পরিবর্তন করে।
  • Sales BOM পরীক্ষা না করে Confirm করে।
  • Reject করার পরে Reject Reason লেখা হয় না।

docs.title: Department Operation Q&A
docs.text: This section organizes daily employee operation questions by department. Form manuals explain what each form is, which fields it contains, and what rules apply. Department Operation Q&A explains how employees use the system every day, how to handle common issues, how to filter data, and how to make routine decisions.

docs.title: How to use this section
docs.text:

docs.title: Production Department — Elastic Order Request Q&A
docs.text: 语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

docs.title: Production Department — Elastic Order Request Q&A
Applicable department
docs.text: Production Department

docs.title: Related form
docs.text: Elastic Order Request

docs.title: Before you start
docs.text:
The Elastic Order Request records visible to Production Department are already approved orders.

Production Department does not need to filter Approval Result = Approve during daily work.

Production Department mainly needs to:

  • Check order information
  • Confirm whether production arrangement is needed
  • Update Production Arrangement Status

docs.title: Question 1: Which Display Fields should Production Department use for Elastic Order Request?
Short answer
docs.text:
The list fields should follow the production arrangement order:

Status → Type → Delivery Date → Sales → Customer → Order No.

This helps production staff quickly answer:

  • Does this order need action?
  • Is it Sample or Bulk?
  • When is the expected delivery date?
  • Which sales person is responsible?
  • Which customer is it?
  • Which order is it?

docs.title: Recommended Display Fields order
docs.text:
The most important first 6 fields are:

  1. Production Arrangement Status
  2. Job Type
  3. Expected Delivery Date
  4. Responsible Sales
  5. Customer Code
  6. Company Name

Field meaning:

  • Production Arrangement Status: check whether the order is pending, scheduled, completed, or cancelled.
  • Job Type: check whether it is Sample or Bulk.
  • Expected Delivery Date: check delivery priority.
  • Responsible Sales: know which sales person to contact for this order.
  • Customer Code: find the customer quickly.
  • Company Name: confirm the customer name.

Fields that can continue after that:

  1. Elastic Order No.
  2. Customer PO No.
  3. Purchase Order Date
  4. Country
  5. Sample Status
  6. Bulk Production Status
  7. Workflow Status

These fields help confirm order source, customer PO, order date, and later status.

docs.title: How to use Production Arrangement Status
docs.text:
Production Department mainly updates this field:

Production Arrangement Status

Status meaning:

  • Pending: not arranged yet. Production needs to handle it.
  • Scheduled: production for sample or bulk has been arranged.
  • Completed: production-related handling is completed.
  • Cancelled: the order is cancelled or no longer needs handling.

The most important daily work is to handle:

Production Arrangement Status = Pending

docs.title: After opening an order, focus on Elastic Order Details
docs.text:
After opening an order, Production Department should mainly check product details:

  • Elastic Code
  • Elastic Type
  • Description
  • Elastic Color
  • Target Color Ref.
  • Order Ref.
  • Width
  • Width Unit
  • Net Weight
  • Quantity
  • Quantity Unit
  • Production Routing
  • Remarks
  • Product Picture

These fields help Production Department understand:

  • Which item should be made?
  • What color is needed?
  • What width is needed?
  • What quantity is needed?
  • Which production routing should be used?
  • Is there any picture or special remark?

docs.title: Question 2: If Production Department does not know the Elastic Order No., how can it quickly find the sales order information?
Short answer
docs.text:
If you do not know Elastic Order No., do not start by searching the order number.

Use this filter order:

Production Arrangement Status → Job Type → Responsible Sales → Customer Code / Company Name → Expected Delivery Date → Elastic Code / Color / Width / Order Ref.

docs.title: Step 1: Filter production arrangement status first
docs.text:
Check this first every day:

Production Arrangement Status = Pending

This means these orders have not been arranged yet and need Production Department action.

To view already arranged orders:

Production Arrangement Status = Scheduled

To find completed orders:

Production Arrangement Status = Completed

docs.title: Step 2: Separate Sample and Bulk
docs.text:
Check the field:

Job Type

For sample orders:

Job Type = Sample

For bulk orders:

Job Type = Bulk

Keep sample and bulk orders separate so the data is easier to read.

docs.title: Step 3: Filter by sales person
docs.text:
If a sales person asks about an order but does not know the order number, filter first by:

Responsible Sales = the sales person

Example:

Responsible Sales = Pete

This narrows the order list to orders handled by that sales person.

docs.title: Step 4: Filter by customer
docs.text:
Continue filtering by:

Customer Code

or:

Company Name

If you know the customer code, use Customer Code first.

If you do not know the customer code, search by Company Name.

docs.title: Step 5: Filter by delivery date
docs.text:
Production scheduling mainly depends on:

Expected Delivery Date

You can filter by:

  • Today
  • This week
  • Next 7 days
  • Next 30 days
  • Specific date

Handle orders with the nearest delivery date first.

docs.title: Step 6: Use product information to find the exact item
docs.text:
If the same customer still has many orders, use product information:

  • Elastic Code
  • Elastic Color
  • Width
  • Order Ref.
  • Customer PO No.
  • Production Routing

Common filter combinations:

  • Pending + Sample + Responsible Sales + Customer Code
  • Pending + Bulk + Customer Code + Expected Delivery Date
  • Customer Code + Width + Elastic Color
  • Responsible Sales + Customer Code + Order Ref.

docs.title: Daily operation flow
docs.text:
Production Department can work like this every day:

  1. Open Elastic Order Request.
  2. Filter Production Arrangement Status = Pending.
  3. Filter Job Type = Sample or Job Type = Bulk.
  4. Sort by Expected Delivery Date.
  5. Check Responsible Sales and Customer Code.
  6. Open the order and check Elastic Order Details.
  7. After arrangement is possible, change Production Arrangement Status to Scheduled.
  8. After completion, change it to Completed.
  9. For cancelled orders, change it to Cancelled.

docs.title: Simple memory rule
docs.text: Status → Job Type → Sales → Customer → Delivery Date → Product Details

docs.title: When Production Department sees an order, ask 4 questions first
docs.text:
1. Is the current status Pending / Scheduled / Completed / Cancelled?
  2. Is this Sample or Bulk?
  3. When is the expected delivery date?
  4. Which elastic item is it?

Once these 4 questions are clear, Production Department can quickly decide how to handle the order.

docs.title: Customer Sample Analysis User Guide — English
docs.text:
语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

Version Updated Status v0.1 2026-06-24 Published

docs.title: Customer Sample Analysis User Guide — English
1. Purpose
docs.text:
Customer Sample Analysis is a technical analysis form used by Production Department for customer elastic samples.

The form records:

  • sample structure, weaving method, width, thickness, handfeel, elongation and weight;
  • material composition and Sample Composition Breakdown;
  • BOM materials, ends, consumption, dyeing requirement, dyeing process and color information;
  • customer sample images, analysis photos or reference attachments.

After the record is added, an automation writes the analysis result back to an existing Elastic Item Master OS technical data section and sample composition information.

This form is not a sales order form. Do not use it for commercial/settlement data or production scheduling.

docs.title: 2. Users and use cases
docs.text:
Main users: Production Department.

There is no separate Design Department. Production users including designers use the same account and permission structure.

Use this form when:

  1. a customer provides a physical sample for analysis;
  2. a customer provides a photo or existing Elastic information that needs technical completion;
  3. Production users need to build material composition and OS BOM for a customer sample;
  4. the sample analysis result must be written back to an existing Elastic Item Master.

docs.title: 3. Current process
docs.text:
• This form currently has no workflow.
  • This form uses an automation assistant to update an existing Elastic Item Master.
  • This form only writes back to existing records. It does not create a new Elastic Item Master.

docs.title: 4. Basic Order Information
docs.text:
These fields identify the customer and Elastic product master data that this analysis belongs to.

Field Employee guidance Select Elastic Select the correct existing Elastic / Elastic Item Master record. Customer Code Key matching field for writing back to Elastic Item Master; do not change randomly. Elastic Code Key matching field for writing back to Elastic Item Master; do not change randomly. Country Customer country or region; review after selection. Responsible Sales Responsible salesperson for traceability. Description Product description from the sample or existing data. Elastic Type Select from current system options. Sales Account Ownership and visibility related field; wrong selection can affect data ownership.

Operating rules:

  1. Select the correct Select Elastic first.
  2. Before saving, confirm that Customer Code and Elastic Code match the target Elastic Item Master.
  3. If Customer Code or Elastic Code is unclear, stop and ask a supervisor or Jodoo Admin.

docs.title: 5. Basic Analysis Information
docs.text:
These fields record the technical analysis result of the sample.

Field Employee guidance Analysis No. Analysis number for traceability. Accountable Designer Production/design user responsible for the analysis. Attachment Upload customer sample images, analysis photos or reference materials. Elastic Category Select from current system options. Structure Enter according to the actual sample structure. Weaving Method Enter according to the actual weaving method. Woven Pattern Woven pattern or structural notes. Knitted Pattern Knitted pattern or structural notes. Elastic Name Sample or product name. Elastic Letter Sample letter or marker. Handfeel Handfeel description. Greige Width / Greige Width Unit Greige width and unit. Finish Width / Finish Width Unit Finished width and unit. Thickness (mm) Thickness in mm. Weft Density (pick/cm) Weft density in pick/cm. Greige Elongation Greige elongation. Finish Elongation Finished elongation. Sample Weight (g/m) Sample weight per meter. Created At Creation time or analysis record time.

Guidance:

  • Fill fields based on actual sample analysis. Do not guess uncertain data.
  • Width, thickness, elongation and weight should be as accurate as practical.
  • Attachment should support the analysis conclusion.

docs.title: 6. Customer Sample Material Analysis
docs.text:
Subform name: Sample Composition Breakdown.

One row represents one material or one material position. Do not mix several materials in one row.

Field Employee guidance Position Material position or structural position. Select Material Select the correct material record. Item Code Must be correct; ask a supervisor if unsure. Item Category Confirm from system data or linked data. Material Type Material type. Standard Item Name Standard material name. 材料中文名 System material Chinese name; preserve exact system label. Base Unit Base unit. Brand Brand. No. of Ends Number of ends. Unit Consumption (g/m) Consumption per meter; affects BOM and later usage judgment. Need Dyeing? Decide whether the material needs dyeing. Dyeing Process Fill when dyeing is needed. Color Name Color name. Target Color Ref. Target color reference. Quality Reference Type Quality reference type. Quality Reference No. Quality reference number. Remarks Notes. Confirm Status Marks whether the row is confirmed; unconfirmed rows must not be treated as final BOM. 单行BOM信息打包 System packing field. Do not edit manually.

docs.title: 7. Create an analysis record
docs.text:
1. Open Customer Sample Analysis.
  2. Click New.
  3. Select the correct existing Elastic record in Select Elastic.
  4. Check Customer Code and Elastic Code.
  5. Check Country, Responsible Sales, Description, Elastic Type and Sales Account.
  6. Fill Analysis No., Accountable Designer and Attachment.
  7. Fill structure, weaving method, pattern, name, handfeel, width, thickness, elongation and weight based on the actual sample.
  8. Fill material composition row by row in Sample Composition Breakdown.
  9. Check Item Code, No. of Ends, Unit Consumption (g/m), Need Dyeing?, Dyeing Process, Color Name and Target Color Ref.
  10. Set the correct Confirm Status for confirmed material rows.
  11. Before saving, recheck Customer Code, Elastic Code and BOM information.

docs.title: 8. What happens after saving
docs.text:
Confirmed automation assistant:

  • Automation name: 材料分析表填写 写回 总表单
  • Trigger form: Customer Sample Analysis
  • Trigger condition: new record Add record
  • Action: update existing Elastic Item Master
  • Matching conditions:
  • Elastic Item Master.Customer Code = Customer Sample Analysis.Customer Code
  • Elastic Item Master.Elastic Code = Customer Sample Analysis.Elastic Code

Important rules:

  • If no existing Elastic Item Master is matched, the system must not automatically create one.
  • Customer Sample Analysis only writes back to existing Elastic Item Master records.
  • Therefore Customer Code and Elastic Code must be accurate.

docs.title: 9. Relationship with Elastic Item Master
docs.text:
Customer Sample Analysis is an important source for OS technical data and sample material composition in Elastic Item Master.

Confirmed OS technical field writeback includes, but is not limited to:

  • Ref. Analysis No. = Analysis No.
  • Accountable Designer = Accountable Designer
  • Attachment (OS) = Attachment
  • Elastic Category (OS) = Elastic Category
  • Structure (OS) = Structure
  • Weaving Method (OS) = Weaving Method
  • Woven Pattern (OS) = Woven Pattern
  • Knitted Pattern (OS) = Knitted Pattern
  • Elastic Name (OS) = Elastic Name
  • Handfeel (OS) = Handfeel
  • Greige Width (OS) = Greige Width
  • Greige Width Unit (OS) = Greige Width Unit
  • Finish Width (OS) = Finish Width
  • Finish Width Unit (OS) = Finish Width Unit
  • Thickness (mm) (OS) = Thickness (mm)
  • Weft Density (pick/cm) (OS) = Weft Density (pick/cm)
  • Greige Elongation (OS) = Greige Elongation
  • Finish Elongation (OS) = Finish Elongation
  • Sample Weight (g/m) (OS) = Sample Weight (g/m)
  • Created At (OS) = Created At
  • 全局BOM字符串集合 = 全局BOM字符串集合, if the field exists

docs.title: 10. Common mistakes
docs.text:
• Selecting the wrong Select Elastic.
  • Customer Code or Elastic Code does not match the target Elastic Item Master.
  • Guessing uncertain technical data.
  • Mixing several materials in one row.
  • Selecting the wrong Item Code.
  • Entering total quantity instead of Unit Consumption (g/m).
  • Judging Need Dyeing? incorrectly.
  • Leaving Dyeing Process, Color Name or Target Color Ref. empty when dyeing is needed.
  • Treating unconfirmed Confirm Status rows as final BOM.
  • Forgetting Attachment, making later sample traceability difficult.

docs.title: 11. Out of scope
docs.text:
This form is not used for:

  • sales orders;
  • commercial or settlement data;
  • production scheduling;
  • creating a new Elastic Item Master.

docs.title: 12. Version history
docs.text: Date Version Change 2026-06-24 0.1 First Customer Sample Analysis guide based on confirmed field list and automation rules.

docs.title: Elastic Customer User Guide — English
docs.text:
语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

Version Updated Status v0.1 2026-06-22 Published

docs.title: 1. Purpose
docs.text:
Elastic Customer is the customer master-data form for the Elastic business. It is not an order form or a product form.

It maintains:

  • customer company and sales ownership;
  • contacts and communication details;
  • billing and banking information;
  • logistics and delivery information.

Create the Elastic Customer record when a new customer first enters the system. Later forms can select this customer and bring forward the approved customer information.

docs.title: 2. Users and use cases
docs.text:
• Sales: creates customers and maintains company, ownership, contact and delivery information.
  • Management: reviews customer grades and customer master data.
  • Admin: maintains form structure, permissions and linked-form configuration.

Use this form when:

  1. a new customer enters the system;
  2. company, sales ownership, contact, banking or address information changes;
  3. product, order, delivery, billing or follow-up records need customer information.

docs.title: 3. Current process
docs.text:
• This form currently has no workflow.
  • This form currently has no automation assistant.
  • The person entering the record must review it before saving.

docs.title: 4. Required fields
docs.text:
A red * at the upper-left of a field means it is required.

Required field Employee guidance Company Name Enter the customer's full formal company name, not a short name. Responsible Sales Select the salesperson responsible for the customer. Sales Account Select the correct system member; it affects permission, ownership and later linked forms. Country(Region) Select the customer's correct country or region.

docs.title: 5. Customer Basic Info
docs.text:
Field Employee guidance Customer Code Generated automatically by the system; do not edit manually. Company Name Formal full company name used on PI, Contract and other official documents. Short Name Internal short name for identification. Responsible Sales Responsible salesperson. Sales Account Required Member field used for ownership, permission and linked forms. Customer Type Select from the options currently shown by the system. Customer Source Select from the options currently shown by the system. Customer Tag Select from the options currently shown by the system. Country(Region) Customer's country or region; enter accurately. BIN Business Identification Number; it may be used for Bangladesh customers. Factory Address Customer's factory address. Office Address Customer's office address. Grade Management field; ordinary employees should not change it without approval.

Do not guess the Customer Code numbering rule or invent dropdown options.

docs.title: 6. Contact Information
docs.text:
Main contact fields:

  • Main Contact Name
  • Position
  • Phone Number
  • E-mail

Enter one additional person per row in the Other Contacts subform:

  • Name
  • Position
  • Phone
  • Email

Keep contact names, phone numbers and email addresses as complete and current as possible.

docs.title: 7. Billing & Banking
docs.text:
Main fields:

  • Bank Name
  • Account No
  • Swift Code
  • Routing
  • Bank Address
  • Bank Country
  • Account Currency
  • Intermediary Bank Required?

Rules:

  1. Use reliable documents supplied by the customer or bank.
  2. Bank Country is the beneficiary bank's country.
  3. Select Intermediary Bank Required only when the customer or beneficiary bank asks for a correspondent/intermediary bank.
  4. When required, complete one row in Intermediary Bank Details with:
  5. SWIFT/BIC
  6. Bank Name
  7. Bank Address
  8. Country
  9. Currency Served
  10. Never guess unclear banking information. Confirm it with the customer, Finance or Management.

docs.title: 8. Logistics & Delivery
docs.text:
Main fields:

  • Default Delivery Address
  • Consignee Name
  • Main Contact
  • Position
  • Phone Number
  • E-mail

Other Contacts subform:

  • Name
  • Position
  • Phone
  • Email

Keep the default delivery address, consignee and delivery contact accurate. Update the customer master record before using changed information in later delivery documents.

docs.title: 9. Create a customer
docs.text:
1. Search Company Name, Short Name or Customer Code to avoid a duplicate.
  2. Click New.
  3. Enter the formal full company name in Company Name.
  4. Select the correct Responsible Sales and Sales Account.
  5. Select the correct Country(Region).
  6. Complete type, source, tag, BIN and address fields from verified information.
  7. Enter the main contact and one additional contact per Other Contacts row.
  8. Enter Billing & Banking only when reliable documents are available.
  9. Complete the default delivery address, consignee and logistics contacts.
  10. Review required fields, contacts, banking and delivery information before saving.

docs.title: 10. Update a customer
docs.text:
1. Find the existing record by Customer Code or Company Name; do not create a duplicate.
  2. Change only information that has been verified.
  3. Confirm the new ownership before changing Responsible Sales or Sales Account.
  4. Use the customer's latest confirmed document when changing bank, phone, email or delivery details.
  5. Management/Admin maintains Grade according to company rules.

docs.title: 11. Relationships
docs.text:
• Select Elastic Customer in Elastic Update by Designer links to Elastic Customer.
  • The currently confirmed linked fields are Customer Code, Company Name, Responsible Sales and Country(Region).
  • Customer in Elastic Item Master comes from Elastic Customer.
  • Sales Account affects ownership of later customer, product and business data.

docs.title: 12. Common mistakes and data safety
docs.text:
• Entering a short name in Company Name.
  • Selecting the wrong Responsible Sales, Sales Account or Country(Region).
  • Creating a duplicate customer.
  • Leaving contact or delivery information outdated.
  • Guessing incomplete banking information.
  • Changing Grade without management approval.

Data safety:

  • Never place real customer names, bank accounts, phone numbers, email addresses or delivery addresses in public manuals, training screenshots or examples.
  • Recheck banking information through the company's internal process before sending it externally.
  • This guide contains field names and operating rules only; it contains no real customer data.

docs.title: Version history
docs.text: Date Version Change 2026-06-22 0.1 First customer master-data guide based on the confirmed field list and blank form screenshots.

docs.title: Elastic Item Master User Guide — English
docs.text:
语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

Version Updated Status v0.5 2026-06-22 Published

docs.title: Elastic Item Master User Guide — English
1. Purpose
docs.text:
Elastic Item Master is the master-data form for Elastic products.

Current confirmed rule: one record = one Elastic product under one customer. Do not store several products in one record.

The form stores customer and product specification, Original Sample (OS) analysis/BOM, and Final Base Sample (FBS) specification/BOM.

docs.title: 2. Users
docs.text:
• Designer Department: product specification, OS analysis and BOM.
  • Sales Department: customer, Responsible Sales, Sales Account and product-data checking.
  • Jodoo Admin: permissions, fields, formulas and automations.

docs.title: 3. Three tabs
docs.text:
1. Elastic Specification — customer, ownership and basic product specification.
  2. Elastic Sample Analysis — Original Sample analysis, technical data and OS BOM.
  3. Elastic FBS Record — final approved technical standard and FBS BOM.

Keep OS and FBS separate. Do not overwrite one with the other.

docs.title: 4. Daily steps
docs.text:
1. Search by customer and product to avoid duplicate records.
  2. Select Customer from Elastic Customer using Select Data.
  3. Check Customer Code, Company Name and Country.
  4. Fill Responsible Sales and select the correct Sales Account.
  5. Complete the product specification.
  6. Complete the OS or FBS tab according to the actual work stage.
  7. Enter one BOM material per row and check unit, ends and consumption.
  8. Review Customer, Sales Account, specification and BOM before saving.

docs.title: 5. Why Sales Account matters
docs.text:
Sales Account is a Member field controlling record ownership, Publish permission and visibility. Responsible Sales may be a name/select field; Sales Account determines which account can see the record.

Bangladesh Sales Team may share one Sales Account. China sales users may use individual Sales Accounts.

docs.title: 6. Current Elastic Specification fields
docs.text: Customer; Customer Code; Company Name; Country; Responsible Sales; Sales Account; Sample File; Elastic Type; Description; Elastic Color; Production Location; Width; Width Unit; Net Weight (g/m); Elastic Code; Quality Requirements.

docs.title: 7. OS and FBS BOM
docs.text:
OS stores customer-original analysis. FBS stores the final approved standard. Both BOM subforms currently use this order:

  1. Select Data; Position; Item Code; Item Category; Material Type
  2. Standard Item Name; 材料中文名; Base Unit; Brand
  3. No. of Ends; Unit Consumption (g/m)
  4. Need Dyeing?; Dyeing Process; Color Name; Target Color Ref.
  5. Quality Reference Type; Quality Reference No.; Remarks; Confirm Status

The final system field is 单行BOM信息打包 for OS and FBS单行BOM信息打包 for FBS. Current OS/FBS BOM subforms do not contain Light Source.

docs.title: 8. Elastic Update by Designer relationship
docs.text:
Elastic Update by Designer collects or supplements product information; it does not directly edit an existing Elastic Item Master.

When Sales Confirmation = Confirm and Sales Account is not empty, the enabled automation adds a new Elastic Item Master record and copies one Common BOM to both OS BOM and FBS BOM. Reject does not synchronize.

docs.title: 9. Do not edit system fields
docs.text:
• Elastic Code
  • 全局BOM字符串集合
  • FBS全局BOM字符串集合
  • 单行BOM信息打包
  • FBS单行BOM信息打包

docs.title: 10. Common mistakes
docs.text:
• Creating a duplicate customer/product record.
  • Putting several Elastic products in one record.
  • Leaving Sales Account empty or selecting the wrong account.
  • Treating OS data as final FBS.
  • Using the wrong BOM material, unit, ends or consumption.
  • Editing system-generated fields manually.

docs.title: Elastic Order Request User Guide — English
docs.text:
语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

Version Updated Status v0.1 2026-06-24 Published

docs.title: Elastic Order Request User Guide — English
1. Purpose
docs.text:
Elastic Order Request is the entry form for Elastic sales orders and sample requests.

Sales users record:

  • customer and order information;
  • Job Type, Billing Type, customer PO and expected delivery date;
  • product details, quantity, color, width and production routing in Elastic Order Details;
  • attachments and remarks.

Production users review this form from a production arrangement view. They mainly check approval result, expected delivery date, product details and Production Arrangement Status to decide whether the order is pending, scheduled, completed or cancelled.

This form is also a source for syncing to the Elastic Sales Order helper table and for creating an Elastic Sample Development Work Order after a Sample request is approved.

docs.title: 2. Users and use cases
docs.text:
Main users:

  • Sales
  • Production
  • Management

There is no separate Design Department. If designers are involved, treat them as production users including designers under the Production account and permission structure.

Use this form when:

  1. Sales receives a customer sample request or bulk order.
  2. Sales needs to enter customer, order, product details, quantity, delivery date and attachments.
  3. A supervisor needs to approve the order in workflow.
  4. Job Type = Sample and supervisor approval should generate a sample development work order.
  5. Production needs to track whether the order still needs production arrangement.

docs.title: 3. Current workflow
docs.text:
Current workflow:

  1. Enter Order Details
  2. Supervisor Approval
  3. End

Supervisor Approval is a Regular Approval node. For daily users, the key point is: complete the order information, submit for supervisor approval, and continue downstream handling only after approval.

docs.title: 4. Production Arrangement Status
docs.text:
Production Arrangement Status helps Production judge the order from a production planning or arrangement perspective.

Option Meaning Pending The order exists, but production has not been arranged or confirmed. Scheduled Production has been arranged, or the order has entered follow-up sample/bulk handling. Completed Production-related handling is completed. Cancelled The order is cancelled or will not continue.

Production users should usually start with records where Approval Result = Approve and Production Arrangement Status = Pending.

docs.title: 5. Sales entry steps
docs.text:
1. Open Elastic Order Request.
  2. Select the correct customer in Select Customer.
  3. Check Customer Code, Company Name, Country, Responsible Sales and Sales Account.
  4. Select the correct Job Type, such as Sample or Bulk, using current system options.
  5. Select the correct Billing Type, such as FOC or CHG, using current system options.
  6. Fill Customer PO No., Purchase Order Date and Expected Delivery Date.
  7. Upload customer order files, images, specification drawings or references in Attachment.
  8. Fill product lines in Elastic Order Details.
  9. Different style, color, width or customer requirement should be entered as separate detail lines.
  10. Select Production Routing carefully because it affects sample or bulk handling.
  11. Submit for supervisor approval.

docs.title: 6. Sales Order Information
docs.text:
These fields identify customer, order source, sales ownership and production arrangement status.

Field Employee guidance Select Customer Select the correct customer record. Customer Code Customer code; used for later sync and lookup. Company Name Customer company name; check after selecting customer. Country Customer country or region. BIN Business Identification Number, if applicable. Responsible Sales Responsible salesperson. Sales Account Ownership and permission related field; must be correct. Job Type Separates Sample / Bulk and other work types; use current system options. Billing Type Separates FOC / CHG and other billing types; use current system options. Customer PO No. Customer PO or reference number. Purchase Order Date Customer order date. Attachment Customer order, image, specification drawing or reference material. Expected Delivery Date Expected delivery date; Production will check this carefully. Remarks Order remarks. Elastic Order No. System order number or internal order number; used for lookup and sync. Production Arrangement Status Production arrangement status.

docs.title: 7. Elastic Order Details
docs.text:
Elastic Order Details is the product detail subform. One row represents one Elastic style or product detail.

Field Employee guidance Select Elastic Select the related Elastic product record. Elastic Code Elastic product code; used for later sync and lookup. Elastic Type Confirm from system data or current options. Description Product description. Elastic Color Color. Target Color Ref. Target color reference. Order Ref. Customer product reference from the order. Width / Width Unit Width and unit. Net Weight Net weight, if applicable. Quantity / Quantity Unit Quantity and unit. Production Routing Production routing; Production will check this carefully. Remarks Product detail remarks. Product Picture Product image or reference picture. Billing Type(辅助) System helper field, equal to main-form Billing Type. Work Type(辅助) System helper field, equal to main-form Job Type.

Sales commercial or settlement-related fields should be filled according to company permissions and process. If Production users see commercial/settlement fields that are not needed for production handling, they should not edit them and should report the permission issue to Admin or Alen.

docs.title: 8. How Production can filter orders quickly
docs.text:
If Production does not know Elastic Order No., do not search only by order number. Filter in this order:

  1. Filter by Responsible Sales.
  2. Filter by Job Type = Sample / Bulk.
  3. Filter by Customer Code or Company Name.
  4. Filter by Production Arrangement Status.
  5. Filter by Expected Delivery Date.
  6. Then use Elastic Code, Order Ref., Width or Elastic Color to find the specific product line.

Fields Production needs most:

  • Approval Result
  • Production Arrangement Status
  • Job Type
  • Expected Delivery Date
  • Responsible Sales
  • Customer Code
  • Company Name
  • Elastic Order No.
  • Customer PO No.
  • Elastic Code
  • Elastic Color
  • Width
  • Quantity
  • Production Routing

Recommended Production display fields include Approval Result, Production Arrangement Status, Job Type, Expected Delivery Date, Responsible Sales, Customer Code, Company Name, Elastic Order No., Customer PO No., Submission Time or Purchase Order Date. This is a recommended configuration, not a confirmation that the system view has already been configured.

docs.title: 9. Review & Approval
docs.text:
Approval fields help supervisors decide whether the order can continue.

Field Meaning Risk Assessment Risk assessment. PO Status PO status. Funding Status Funding status. L/C Readiness L/C readiness. Priority Priority. Remarks Approval remarks. Order Approval Order approval field. Approval Result Approval result. Approval Time Approval time. Approver Approver. Reason for Rejection Rejection reason.

If the order is rejected, check Reason for Rejection and follow the supervisor's instruction before continuing.

docs.title: 10. Production Status
docs.text:
Production status fields:

  • Sample Status
  • Bulk Production Status

These fields track later sample and bulk production handling. Use the current system options.

docs.title: 11. What happens after saving or approval
docs.text:
Confirmed automation relationships:

  1. 松紧带销售订单更新到辅助表 syncs Elastic Order Request data to the Elastic Sales Order helper table.
  2. When Job Type = Sample and Supervisor Approval is approved, 松紧带生产申请 批准后 生成松紧带样板Work Card creates an Elastic Sample Development Work Order.

Employee reminders:

  • Customer Code, Elastic Order No. and Elastic Code affect sync and matching.
  • Wrong Job Type may prevent sample work order creation or cause the wrong downstream process.
  • Wrong Production Routing affects production/sample handling.

docs.title: 12. Common mistakes
docs.text:
• Selecting the wrong Select Customer.
  • Choosing the wrong Job Type between Sample and Bulk.
  • Choosing the wrong Billing Type.
  • Missing or inaccurate Expected Delivery Date.
  • Mixing different styles, colors or widths in one Elastic Order Details row.
  • Not selecting Production Routing carefully.
  • Forgetting to upload customer order, image or specification attachment.
  • Production searches only by order number and cannot find the order; use combined filters.
  • Treating unapproved orders as confirmed production orders.

docs.text: Date Version Change 2026-06-24 0.1 First Elastic Order Request guide based on confirmed fields, workflow and automation rules.

语言 / Language / ভাষা：中文 · English · বাংলা

Version Updated Status v0.4 2026-06-22 Published

docs.title: Elastic Update by Designer User Guide — English
1. Purpose
docs.text:
Elastic Update by Designer is a workflow form for collecting or supplementing Elastic product information and Common BOM Details for a specified customer and Sales Account.

After Sales Department confirms the record, the enabled automation adds a new record to Elastic Item Master. This form does not directly edit an existing Item Master record.

docs.title: 2. Users
docs.text:
• Designer Department: selects customer and Sales Account, then enters product information and Common BOM.
  • Sales Department: reviews all information and selects Confirm or Reject.
  • Jodoo Admin: investigates workflow, permission, formula or automation problems.

Access and data scope:

  • Sales - Elastic Update Records: used by Marketing Department.
  • Designer - My Elastic Update by Designer: used by Production Department.
  • Designer data scope is controlled by Sales Account = Current User.

docs.title: 3. Current workflow
docs.text:
1. Designer Editing
  2. Sales Review & Confirmation
  3. End

Designer should not edit Sales Confirmation, Reject Reason or Approval Time. Sales must provide Reject Reason when rejecting.

docs.title: 4. Entry principles
docs.text:
• Select Elastic Customer is linked to the Elastic Customer form.
  • After selection, Customer Code, Company Name, Responsible Sales and Country(Region) are filled automatically.
  • Sales Account is a required Member field. Its selectable users come from Marketing Department.
  • A red * at the upper-left of a field means the field is required.
  • For dropdown fields, use the options currently shown by the system.
  • Complete product information as fully as practical.
  • Enter Common BOM Details truthfully. Unknown information may be left blank and must not be guessed.
  • Global BOM string collection, FBS single-row BOM packing and similar fields are system calculation/packing fields. Do not edit them manually.

docs.title: 5. Review field display rules
docs.text:
• When Sales Confirmation = Confirm, Approval Time is displayed.
  • When Sales Confirmation = Reject, Reject Reason is displayed.
  • Enter Reject Reason when rejecting.

docs.title: 6. Common BOM Details
docs.text:
The current field names include material selection/identity, No. of Ends, Unit Consumption (g/m), dyeing details, color references, quality references, Light Source, Remarks, Confirm Status and a packed BOM field.

Common BOM Details synchronizes to Sample Composition Breakdown (OS) and Sample Composition Breakdown (FBS) in Elastic Item Master. Field names remain the same, and fields with the same name are synchronized.

docs.title: 7. Designer steps
docs.text:
1. Open Elastic Update by Designer and click New.
  2. Select the customer in Select Elastic Customer.
  3. Check Customer Code, Company Name, Responsible Sales and Country(Region).
  4. Select the correct Sales Account.
  5. Enter product type, description, color, width, unit, net weight and remarks.
  6. Enter all known Common BOM Details, one material per row.
  7. Check material, unit, ends, consumption, dyeing and quality references.
  8. Do not edit review fields or system-packed fields.
  9. Submit to Sales Review & Confirmation.

docs.title: 8. Sales review
docs.text:
1. Review customer and Sales Account.
  2. Review product specification and units.
  3. Review every Common BOM row.
  4. Choose Confirm only when information is correct and complete.
  5. Choose Reject when information is wrong or incomplete, then complete Reject Reason.

docs.title: 9. Result after review
docs.text:
The automation is enabled. On Update Record, the currently confirmed conditions are Sales Confirmation = Confirm and Sales Account is not empty.

The assistant adds a new Elastic Item Master record. Common BOM Details synchronizes to Sample Composition Breakdown (OS) and Sample Composition Breakdown (FBS); fields with the same name are synchronized. Reject does not synchronize.

docs.title: 10. Common mistakes
docs.text:
• Customer is not selected, or Sales Account is empty/incorrect.
  • Width, weight or Unit Consumption uses the wrong unit.
  • Unknown BOM information is guessed.
  • Designer edits review fields.
  • Sales confirms without checking the BOM.
  • Sales rejects without entering Reject Reason.
  • A user expects this form to edit an existing Item Master record.

docs.text: Date Version Change 2026-06-22 0.4 Removed the backend administration notes section from the employee guide. 2026-06-22 0.3 Simplified the employee guide and confirmed access views, Sales Account scope, required-field marker, Confirm/Reject display rules and same-name Common BOM synchronization. 2026-06-21 0.2 Built from the verified workflow, display rules and enabled Add Record automation.
